# Security Policy

## Supported versions

This project is supported on the latest released version only.  
If a security issue is found, it will usually be fixed in the latest patch or minor release.

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you believe you’ve found a security vulnerability in this project, please do not open a public issue with details.

Instead, report it privately and include:

- A clear description of the issue.
- Steps or a minimal example to reproduce it, if possible.
- Any potential impact you’re aware of.

I will review the report as soon as possible and coordinate a fix and release if the issue is confirmed.
